name: IdsEdwProdCmpntDExtr

text.value: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.S1_TMP_IdsEdwProdCmpntDExtr; WITH cte AS ( SELECT P.PROD_CMPNT_SK, COALESCE(SIGNALCD.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS SRC_SYS_CD, P.PROD_ID, P.PROD_CMPNT_TYP_CD_SK, P.PROD_CMPNT_EFF_DT_SK, P.PROD_SK, P.PROD_CMPNT_PFX_ID, P.PROD_CMPNT_TERM_DT_SK, M2.TRGT_CD AS TYP_TRGT_CD, M2.TRGT_CD_NM FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.PROD_CMPNT P LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG SIGNALCD ON P.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = SIGNALCD.CD_MPPNG_SK LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG M2 ON P.PROD_CMPNT_TYP_CD_SK = M2.CD_MPPNG_SK WHERE P.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.IDSRunCycle} ), cte_xfm AS ( SELECT PROD_CMPNT_SK, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(SRC_SYS_CD) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE SRC_SYS_CD END AS SRC_SYS_CD, PROD_ID, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(TYP_TRGT_CD) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE TYP_TRGT_CD END AS PROD_CMPNT_TYP_CD, PROD_CMPNT_EFF_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, PROD_SK, PROD_CMPNT_PFX_ID, PROD_CMPNT_TERM_DT_SK, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(TRGT_CD_NM) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE TRGT_CD_NM END AS PROD_CMPNT_TYP_NM, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, PROD_CMPNT_TYP_CD_SK FROM cte ) SELECT * INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.S1_TMP_IdsEdwProdCmpntDExtr FROM cte_xfm

Add Defaults and Null Handling.
